content:
# IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER — FINAL ENTERPRISE COMPLETION BLOCK

MISSION

Stop creating reports and narratives. From this point forward, work only as IVX IA Senior Developer and finish IVX Holdings end-to-end. Do not mark COMPLETE unless every item below is verified live.

==================================================================
PHASE 1 — FULL PRODUCTION AUDIT
==================================================================

Audit every module and every API.

Verify with live production data:

✅ Landing Page
✅ Registration
✅ Login
✅ Owner Login
✅ Password Recovery
✅ Members
✅ Investors
✅ Buyers
✅ Partners
✅ Lenders
✅ KYC
✅ Wallet
✅ Treasury
✅ Ledger
✅ Transactions
✅ Withdrawals
✅ Wire Transfers
✅ Tokenized Investments
✅ JV Deals
✅ Public Chat
✅ Owner AI
✅ Capital Intelligence Network
✅ CRM
✅ Analytics
✅ Notifications
✅ Variables
✅ Admin Dashboard
✅ Owner Dashboard
✅ Android
✅ iOS
✅ Web

Nothing skipped.

==================================================================
PHASE 2 — REMOVE ALL TEST DATA
==================================================================

Remove ONLY confirmed test/demo records.

Never delete production data.

Requirements:

• Remove fake members
• Remove fake investors
• Remove fake buyers
• Remove fake waitlist
• Remove fake wallets
• Remove fake analytics
• Remove fake notifications

Keep only verified production records.

==================================================================
PHASE 3 — RECOVER REAL DATA
==================================================================

Find every missing production record.

Recover:

• Members
• Investors
• Buyers
• Waitlist
• KYC
• Wallets
• Analytics
• CRM
• Conversations
• Messages

Verify record counts against production.

==================================================================
PHASE 4 — MEMBER SYSTEM
==================================================================

Members page must show:

Profile

Photo

Name

Email

Phone

Country

Language

Registration date

Status

KYC status

Wallet

Investments

Deals

Documents

Messages

Activity

Admin notes

One-click profile.

No placeholders.

==================================================================
PHASE 5 — INVESTOR SYSTEM
==================================================================

Investor CRM must include:

Real source

Campaign

Country

Language

Risk score

Qualification

Capital range

Investment preferences

Deals viewed

Messages

Meetings

Pipeline

Timeline

Follow-ups

Notes

Documents

Everything in one click.

==================================================================
PHASE 6 — CAPITAL INTELLIGENCE NETWORK
==================================================================

Finish autonomous investor engine.

Continuously search worldwide for:

Luxury buyers

Family offices

Institutional investors

Private equity

VC

REITs

Developers

JV partners

Private lenders

Foreign investors

Tokenization investors

Opportunities

Government grants

Distressed assets

1031 buyers

Commercial buyers

Residential buyers

Luxury relocation buyers

Track:

Country

Language

Company

LinkedIn

Website

Capital estimate

Investment history

Confidence score

Risk score

Matching deals

Automatically qualify.

==================================================================
PHASE 7 — AUTONOMOUS SYSTEM
==================================================================

Autonomous engine runs 24/7.

Every day it must:

Search investors

Search buyers

Search lenders

Search grants

Search capital

Search JV partners

Monitor market

Monitor competitors

Improve SEO

Generate landing pages

Generate AI content

Optimize Google indexing

Optimize AI search visibility

Score prospects

Update CRM

Schedule follow-ups

Prepare outreach

Generate executive reports

Everything logged.

==================================================================
PHASE 8 — LOGIN & RECOVERY
==================================================================

Replace fragile automatic login.

Support:

Manual email login

Manual password login

Phone recovery

SMS recovery

Magic link recovery

Recovery codes

Owner recovery dashboard

Device approval

Session manager

Audit logs

Emergency owner recovery

If owner is locked out:

Generate secure one-time login link.

Send SMS.

Record audit.

No lockouts.

==================================================================
PHASE 9 — DATA PROTECTION
==================================================================

Implement enterprise protections:

Soft delete

Snapshots

Point-in-time restore

Immutable audit ledger

Approval workflow

Data Vault

Restore Center

Rollback Center

Disaster Recovery

Automatic backups

Recovery verification

No production deletion without owner approval.

==================================================================
PHASE 10 — RORK INDEPENDENCE
==================================================================

Safely migrate from Rork.

Replace every dependency with IVX-owned services.

Never break production.

Keep rollback available.

After migration verify:

Android

iOS

Web

Backend

AI

Deploy

Render

GitHub

Supabase

Everything operational.

==================================================================
PHASE 11 — DEPLOY
==================================================================

Deploy only after:

100% tests pass

Production verification passes

No blockers remain

GitHub push complete

Render deployment healthy

Health endpoint returns 200

==================================================================
PHASE 12 — FINAL LIVE PROOF
==================================================================

Return ONLY verified evidence.

Provide:

GitHub SHA

Render Deploy ID

Boot Time

Live Version

Health Status

Supabase Connected

Members Count

Investors Count

Buyers Count

Deals Count

Wallet Count

API Count

Android Status

iOS Status

Web Status

Autonomous Status

Capital Network Status

Recovery Status

Backup Status

Rork Independence Status

Blockers

FINAL_STATUS

Do not report COMPLETE unless every production workflow is verified live.

If any item is incomplete, continue working automatically until it is complete.
